meaning: adv.高兴地,活泼地,得意洋洋地
examples: He walked jauntily into the café.
He set off jauntily, whistling to himself.
His straw hat stuck jauntily on the side of his head.
Oz is fifty-two and jauntily fit, with a perfectly tamed helmet of brown hair and lengthy sideburns.
"This is a helluva walrus, " says Myhrvold jauntily, trying unsuccessfully to lift the large skull out of its box.
